examples: There is an interesting and unexplained anomaly in tamarack from northern localities in west central Canada.
My father took Bob and me walking out through the tamarack woods and a mile beyond, where we were faced with a sudden high ridge.
Located 9, 150-feet above sea level, the Tamarack Lodge opened in mid-December.
Jean-Pierre Boespflug, head of the Tamarack resort in Idaho, struck a deal to use 2, 100 state acres in tandem with 1, 500 acres of private land.
